heading: 4th year IT student. Full-time content operator.
paragraphs: I'm a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology student at National University Laguna × Asia Pacific College, expected to graduate July 2027. Alongside classes, I run ERO | VISUALS — a content brand I built from zero — and serve as Video Production Officer for my university's Student Council.

I work in Premiere Pro and After Effects daily, and use AI tools like Claude to speed up planning and research without cutting corners on quality. Open to remote work across US, UK, AU, and Asia time zones.

education.label: BS Information Technology (Mobile & Web Applications), NU Laguna × APC
